svg.text: Fig5 comparison: direct sweepGA 1:1 no-scaffold schematic
Direct sweepGA 1:1 no-scaffold comparison; coordinates are native 500 kb assembly-window offsets, not CHM13 projections.
Plain native 0-500 kb windows; unbanded; not CHM13 or whole-chromosome scale.
local coordinate inside each native 500 kb assembly window (0-based offset)
Evidence blocks use local 0-based half-open offsets from direct sweepGA 1:1 no-scaffold PAFs; source labels show native 500 kb assembly windows.
